caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with gold lettering that reads "BOSS TALK" is seated in a studio. He wears a gold chain and a gold watch on his left wrist. He is looking to his left, holding a small piece of paper in his hands. In front of him is a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. Behind him is a white wall with yellow stars and the word "HUSTLE" repeated. A red and blue banner above him contains the text "Where BOSSES Talk!" and "TALK 101". To his right, a blue container with text that includes "TALK OUT" sits on the table. Small logos appearing in the bottom corners of the frame include "T-TALK". Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, slightly shifting his posture and grip on the paper while continuing to look toward the left.
